{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231910222B62D84E0B7E18B4FE60"}"},"total":223},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7524704909217448728","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然作者是第一本小说，但我觉得整体非常好看！男主们思想都很好！沈亦黎敢放下，颜鹤之不占女主便宜！可惜这两位在书中没有好的结局，希望大大多出电竞文哈（本人爱看电竞文）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751984325,"group_id":"7231731311637957635","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"纵使情已尽，终究意难平，我们短暂交错，尾声潮落，致敬这场遇见","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ErRuHG1BnaQKz27zmF3is=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/458412def3b24916b0f9f6e4dd8807b4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793159&x-signature=nHilF0GrBUS7yrddZSjNhI3w3iQ%3D","user_id":"165370512539908","user_name":"终生柒w"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"165370512539908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7231731311637957635","book_info":{"abstract":"【电竞，1V1，甜宠，狗血，日常】
简介废，作者本人觉得很狗血，狗血，狗血
非单纯小甜文，会狗血，xxs文笔
可爱女主播VS天才职业选手
沈诗诗从来没想过自己竟然会在直播的时候被一个兰陵王抓到哭。
结束对局，对方竟然添加她为好友，上来第一句就是我带你把这颗星摘回来。
可她非不领情，谁知下一把再次遇见。
没曾想，两个人竟然会在现实生活中有了联系。
某次平台举办的明星表演赛，高景瀚锁定了沈诗诗，又掏出了她最讨厌的兰陵王，只是这一次他放水了。
从此，沈诗诗的直播间的榜一位置就被某个职业选手霸占了。
赛后采访，面对主持人莫宁的暗送秋波，沈诗诗坐不住了。
【女主：沈诗诗，游戏ID：一只小狮子，外号：小狮子。某主播平台的女主播，全能菜鸡补位，花痴，恋爱脑。】
【男主：高景瀚，游戏ID：LZQ. YiR。小号：抱抱景崽。冠军战队LZQ打野选手，超人气天才选手，人前高冷，人后又奶又狼。恋爱脑】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7215eeb2601aa425b5ff2b2b11b5ede0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"橙芊芊","author_id":"","book_id":"7231731311637957635","book_name":"【电竞】这个打野有点甜","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1483人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7231803439527920140","read_count":"1483","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"265712"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"119","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,直播,天才,甜宠,电竞,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7215eeb2601aa425b5ff2b2b11b5ede0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448222&x-signature=soaLjhJ4ZH7xHvBQMU285JqSogU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109236321899","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"155"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231910222B62D84E
